Motion For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:59am and concluding at 10:17am.

Plaintiff Ryan Radoc and Counsel Eric Ritistein appear via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Lutrece Davis not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff Ryan Radoc and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ryan Radoc, and against Defendant Lutrece Davis as follows:

Damages: $1,261,556.95
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $2,529.15
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,264,086.10

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:20:42 a.m. and concluding at 10:35:57 a.m.(D505)

Gary Roth, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Ryan Radoc who was present, placed under oath but did not testify via Zoom Video Conference.

The request for default judgment is continued to July 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.
